title: helianthemum tuberaria
intro: Helianthemum tuberaria, also known as rockrose or frostweed, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Cistaceae family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. Helianthemum tuberaria can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used topically to treat skin conditions and internally to support immune function.
